warnings: F16 (16 piles, 1.75x1.75m cap) is the largest pile cap in this project so far, matching the F16 mark seen at grid2-gridE and grid2-gridC on S-03's pile footing plan (the heaviest-loaded columns C2A/C2) -- consistent cross-check.
This is the last pile-footing detail sheet -- all pile marks referenced on S-03 (F4/F6/F8/F11/F12/F16) are now fully documented across S-15/S-16/S-17.
